description: Congratulations, Dad-to-be! Are you ready to get started on this exciting and life-changing time in your life? Or maybe it‚Äôs all A LOT to take in and you‚Äôre feeling like you need some support? 101 Things Every New Dad Needs to Know is your easy-to-read guide to navigating the incredible journey of fatherhood. Written by an experienced father of three, this book is packed with practical advice, expert insights, and heartwarming stories that will prepare you for every step of the way‚Äîfrom pregnancy to toddlerhood. Discover 101 essential tips, tricks, and secrets on Babyproofing your home, Mastering newborn care, Bonding with your little one Taking care of your lady Tackling the infamous toddler stage Managing your stress And much more! Plus the book has been written in such a way that you'll feel like you're getting advice from a trusted friend who‚Äôs been through it all, rather than some dry textbook. Don't just survive fatherhood‚Äîthrive in it! Grab your copy of 101 Things Every New Dad Needs to Know today and step confidently into your role as the dad your child deserves. Read more
